user.title: iStore Solar
user.description: Choose how Home Assistant should authenticate with iStore Solar.

automatic.title: Sign in to iStore Solar
automatic.description: Home Assistant will store your account and password in the config entry so it can sign in again when the access token expires. Refresh-token support is not implemented yet. {error_detail}

manual_token.title: Use iStore Solar access token manually
manual_token.description: Advanced fallback setup with the Local Storage value named dtv_access_token. {error_detail}

reauth_confirm.title: Update iStore Solar credentials
reauth_confirm.description: Update the credentials for this iStore Solar entry. {error_detail}

reauth_automatic.title: Update iStore Solar sign-in
reauth_automatic.description: Enter the account and password again. Home Assistant will preserve existing devices and entities. {error_detail}

reauth_manual_token.title: Update iStore Solar access token
reauth_manual_token.description: Enter a replacement dtv_access_token from the iStore portal. {error_detail}

error.api_error: The iStore API returned an error
error.invalid_scan_interval: Polling interval must be between 15 and 300 seconds
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials or expired access token
error.malformed_public_key: The iStore login public key could not be used
error.malformed_response: The iStore API response could not be understood
error.server_error: The iStore API returned an error
error.token_mismatch: The iStore session token could not be verified
error.unexpected_login_response: The iStore login response could not be understood
error.unsupported_response: This iStore account response is not supported yet
error.wrong_account: The replacement token belongs to a different account

abort.reauth_failed: Could not find the existing iStore Solar entry
abort.reauth_successful: The iStore Solar access token was updated
abort.wrong_account: The replacement token belongs to a different account

init.title: iStore Solar options
init.description: Update credentials or polling interval. Switching authentication modes requires removing and re-adding the integration. {error_detail}

automatic.title: iStore Solar sign-in options
automatic.description: Update the account or polling interval. Leave the password blank to keep the existing stored password. {error_detail}

manual_token.title: iStore Solar token options
manual_token.description: Update the manual access token or polling interval. Leave the access token blank to keep the current token. {error_detail}

error.api_error: The iStore API returned an error
error.invalid_scan_interval: Polling interval must be between 15 and 300 seconds
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials or expired access token
error.malformed_public_key: The iStore login public key could not be used
error.token_mismatch: The iStore session token could not be verified
error.unexpected_login_response: The iStore login response could not be understood
error.unsupported_response: This iStore account response is not supported yet
error.wrong_account: The replacement token belongs to a different account
